Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Thirumbi pogum dhisai
edhu therindhadhu maaripogaadhey
varuvadhai nee edhir kondu paarthidu
kolai aagaadhey

Un ila ratham adhu nitham, kodhikattum
enniya ennam adhu endrum jeikatum
thappaedhum illai
ne appanuku pillai

adhirthu nill, edhiriye illaai.
nambikkai kol, thadaigale illai
Nimidam yen, nodigale podhum
ninaipadhe vettribthaaney
elundhuvaa ... laayillaa
laayilallaa...

Ellam tharuvadhai yetrukol
kaal padhivadhai aliyadhu
vaan velivarai thottusel
un parambarai mudivedhu

Vilidhadhum thoonga thoondaadhu
elundhapin viludhal aagaadhu
vaaraadha pozhudhu
varugira pozhudhu
vaarik kol

Vaaraadha ondrai tharukira neram
po parandhu vandhe irundhirupom
uyarndhu

adhirthu nill, edhiriye illaai.
nambikkai kol, thadaigale illai
Nimidam yen, nodigale podhum
ninaipadhe vettribthaaney
elundhuvaa

Ondrae uruven ennikol
indre nijamena etrukkol
anbaal inaidhadhu vilagaadhu
adhuve iraiarul..kol

Ninaithadhai nadathi munneru
nilaikattum namadhu, varalaaru
yedhaanapodhum vidigira pozhudhu
maarumo...
yellaarukum ingae ini varum kaalam
aanandham, aaraambam
idhu nirandharam naathaan

Thirumbi pogum dhisai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Edhirthu Nil?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, emphasizing the importance of seizing the moment and enjoying life.

What is the context of this song in the movie Biriyani?

This song is featured during a lively party scene, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters.

Who are the singers of Edhirthu Nil?

The song is sung by G. V. Prakash Kumar, Thaman S, and Vijay Antony.

Who composed the music for Edhirthu Nil?

The music for this song was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Edhirthu Nil released?

The song was released on August 17, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Edhirthu Nil, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree and celebratory moments of the movie Biriyani. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The collaboration of talented singers adds to the song's charm, creating an infectious vibe that resonates with the audience. Overall, the song beautifully conveys the essence of enjoying life's moments to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Edhirthu Nil is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between G. V. Prakash Kumar, Thaman S, and Vijay Antony. With Yuvan's dynamic composition and Gangai Amaran's catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the infectious energy of Biriyani and let the music take over!
stanzaMeanings: Which direction is going back? Don't let it change. You should face it and not let it become a murder.
Your blood is always there, it will always win. There is no mistake, you are a son to your father.
Stay still, there is no direction. Trust is lost, there are no obstacles. At this moment, just think about it and let it go.
Just think about it and let it go.
Everything is given to you, the time to learn is not wasted. The sky touches your lineage.
Even if it is lost, it won't be a waste. When the time comes, it will come, so don't worry about it.
When the time comes, it will be given to you, we will be here, rising high.
Stay still, there is no direction. Trust is lost, there are no obstacles. At this moment, just think about it and let it go.
We are one, this is true. Don't let love fade away, that is the real blessing.
What we think will happen, let it be our guide. Whenever it happens, will it change? Everyone here will now have happiness, this is a constant beginning.
Which direction is going back? Don't let it change. You should face it and not let it become a murder.
Your blood is always there, it will always win. There is no mistake, you are a son to your father.
Stay still, there is no direction. Trust is lost, there are no obstacles. At this moment, just think about it and let it go.
Just think about it and let it go.
